summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. The hydrated preflight artifact reports no security-sensitive refs, no shared canonical, and close/merge/fix PR paths are not available for this shard. Hydrated PRs are kept as independent backlog items; refs omitted from the compacted preflight artifact need a fresh hydrate before classification.
